title: The Powerpuff Girls: Chemical X-Traction
short_description: Blossom, Bubbles, and Buttercup battle Townsville's empowered villains to reclaim the stolen Chemical X.
description: The Powerpuff Girls: Chemical X-Traction is a 2001 3D fighting game developed by VIS Entertainment and Asylum Entertainment and published by BAM! Entertainment. After Mojo Jojo steals a Chemical X-laced pie and shares it with Townsville's villains — granting them all superpowers — the three Powerpuff Girls set out to track them down. Players battle through Story and Simulator modes across ten playable characters, collecting vials of Chemical X to unleash super-powered attacks. The game was released on PlayStation and Nintendo 64.
